title: Big Globe - Caverns & Chasms Compatibility
body:
[**Alternative CurseForge Download**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/data-packs/big-globe-caverns-chasms-compatibility)

Needs [Sinytra Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector), A compatibility mod/datapack that places the [Caverns & Chasms](https://modrinth.com/mod/caverns-and-chasms) ores (Silver And Spinel) in the generation of [Big Globe](https://modrinth.com/mod/big-globe) and also fixes the mobs spawn of the same mod, so that the mobs now if they are generated correctly


### The silver ore naturally generates the in Overworld but in the **frozen caves** there are more chanse to find more silver ore

![The silver mineral naturally generates the in Overworld but in the frozen caves there are more chanse to find more silver ore](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/95ecbb8fc0c65597d56b23797c76226facef0a54.png)
![Silver Ore in Frozen Caves](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5ca1f840321b823ba53583e2687e49d90bf9e294.png)


### The spinel ore will be generated naturally in the **Lush Caves**

![Spinel Ore In Lush Cave](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d6801dd45ee829d1ba792f800542cc7e19df81f6_0.webp)
![Spinel Ore In Lush Cave](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a1b2aac7df35b3d0bf3ffb76b2b8487032c5beae.png)


### The soul silver ore is generated naturally the nether but can be found with more chances in the biome **Valley of Souls**

![Silver Ore in Nether](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0a03ac470241db1c0047eb676dd7a75f3d9f2f50_0.webp)
![Silver Ore In Nether](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/16b9f1c016df0c640b31f6da3b649f1ce00cb8f6_0.webp)
